---
title: "User Guide"
---

## Getting Started

This guide explains how to use the IS428 VABITeam3 interactive dashboard.

## System Requirements

- Modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Internet connection
- No installation required

## Accessing the Dashboard
Click this [link](tableau_dashboard.qmd) to access our dashboard within Netlify. <br>
Click this [link](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/dycia.chin/viz/G2T3TableauWorkbook/Story1) to access our dashboard on Tableau Public.

## Accessing the Guide

Click this [link](G2T3_User_Guide.pdf) to access our user guide.
